calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patriia VanSteenberge.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Georgetta Lovett, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Julius Briggs.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Ten-Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 520 Jones St., #308, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $1,483.50
Waived Costs, for a Total of $1,483.50
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CINTER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY JOSEPH KOOMAS FOR DEFENDANT JULIUS BRIGGS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS
